fields.question: What is the maximum capacity for an event?
fields.answer: Our venues can accommodate up to 500 guests. For larger events, please contact our sales team.

fields.question: Do you provide catering services?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer a variety of catering options, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free menus.

fields.question: Can I book a venue for a private party?
fields.answer: Yes, our venues are available for private parties. Please visit the 'Venues' page to book.

fields.question: What is the minimum booking duration?
fields.answer: The minimum booking duration is 4 hours. For shorter events, please contact our support team.

fields.question: Do you provide audio-visual equipment?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide audio-visual equipment, including microphones, projectors, and speakers.

fields.question: Can I book a photographer for my event?
fields.answer: Yes, we offer professional photography services. Please contact our event planners for details.

fields.question: What is your privacy policy?
fields.answer: We take your privacy seriously. Please read our privacy policy on our website for more details.

fields.question: How do I get to the event venue?
fields.answer: You can find directions to the venue on our website or contact support for assistance.

fields.question: Is parking available at the venue?
fields.answer: Yes, we provide free parking for all guests. Please check the venue details for parking instructions.

fields.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
fields.answer: Outside food and drinks are not allowed. We offer a variety of catering options for your event.

fields.question: What is the dress code for the event?
fields.answer: The dress code is formal. Please check the event details for specific requirements.

fields.question: Can I invite additional guests after booking?
fields.answer: Yes, you can add guests up to 3 days before the event. Please contact support for assistance.
